fields.summary: Yarn Service Upgrade: Add support to upgrade a component
Support service upgrade via YARN Service API and CLI

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: Yarn service upgrade should provide an API to upgrade the component.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body:
[~eyang]  [~gsaha] could you please help review this patch?

Steps to upgrade:
# yarn.service.upgrade.enabled = true
# yarn app -launch test1 sleeper
# yarn app -upgrade test1 -initiate sleeper_upgrade.json 
# yarn app -upgrade test1 -components sleeper
# yarn app -upgrade test1 -finalize
